channel.title: Home on Gilbert N. Onyenwezi | Operations leader, Data Science & Artificial Intelligence Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Gilbert N. Onyenwezi | Operations leader, Data Science & Artificial Intelligence Portfolio

item.title: About
item.description:
About Me

I am a supply chain and operations leader with extensive experience across manufacturing, logistics, quality, and distribution. My career has been built on driving operational excellence through data, process improvement, and cross-functional collaboration.

I am currently pursuing a Master’s in Data Science with an Artificial Intelligence specialization at Northwestern University. Through this program, I am expanding my technical capabilities in data science, data engineering, SQL, Python, and Go.

item.title: AI-Powered Quality Inspection System
item.description:
Problem

Manufacturing environments often rely on manual inspection processes that are inconsistent, slow, and difficult to scale.

Objective

Design a system that uses computer vision and analytics to detect defects earlier, improve classification accuracy, and provide root-cause data.

Tools

Python, Computer Vision, Data Analysis

item.title: Contact
item.description:
Contact

I’m open to opportunities, collaborations, and conversations in data science, data engineering, supply chain analytics, and operational excellence.

  • Email: Trebligism@gmail.com
  • LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gilbert-onyenwezi-71853531/
  • GitHub: https://github.com/yourusername

item.title: Education
item.description:
Education

Master of Science in Data Science (AI Specialization)

Northwestern University
Expected 2026

Associate Degree in Computer Science & Information Systems

Middlesex College
2021

Postgraduate Certificate in Entrepreneurship and Innovation

Massachusetts Institute of Technology
2018

item.title: ERP-Ready Data Pipeline for Operations
item.description:
Problem

Operational data is often fragmented across systems, making it difficult to generate consistent, reliable insights.

Objective

Design a data pipeline that cleans and standardizes operational data and supports integration with ERP platforms.

Tools

SQL, Python, Data Modeling

item.title: Experience
item.description:
experience: enable: true items: - job: “Operational Excellence & Distribution Leadership” company: “Wilsonart” companyUrl: "" date: “Apr 2023 – Sept 2025” content: | Led end-to-end operational performance across manufacturing and distribution, driving measurable improvements in efficiency, quality, and throughput through data-driven decision-making and Lean methodologies.

    **Operational Excellence Manager (2024 – 2025)**
    - Led enterprise-level supply chain and manufacturing transformation initiatives
    - Developed KPI frameworks across Safety, Quality, Service, and Cost
    - Built capacity planning models and multi-year operational roadmaps
    - Partnered with leadership to execute cross-functional strategic initiatives
    - Drove continuous improvement through Lean Six Sigma and structured problem-solving

    **Area Manager – Distribution (2023 – 2024)**
    - Managed distribution and receiving operations in high-volume environment
    - Led teams to achieve operational targets aligned with business objectives
    - Implemented process improvements to increase efficiency and reduce waste
    - Monitored daily performance metrics and executed corrective actions
    - Ensured compliance with ISO and quality standards

    **Impact**
    - Improved operational visibility through KPI-driven management
    - Reduced process inefficiencies and enhanced throughput
    - Strengthened alignment between operations, logistics, and leadership

- job: "Global Warehouse & Logistics Management"
  company: "Johnson Controls"
  companyUrl: ""
  date: "Mar 2022 – Mar 2023"
  content: |
    Managed global warehouse operations and eCommerce fulfillment, focusing on execution efficiency, logistics performance, and data-informed decision-making.

    - Directed end-to-end fulfillment operations and logistics coordination
    - Developed demand forecasts and operational plans using data analysis
    - Led warehouse relocation and operational transition initiatives
    - Evaluated and improved logistics partner performance
    - Collaborated with cross-functional teams to enhance customer experience

    **Impact**
    - Improved fulfillment reliability and operational responsiveness
    - Strengthened logistics coordination and execution consistency
    - Enhanced decision-making through data-driven forecasting

- job: "Transportation & Operations Leadership"
  company: "Amazon"
  companyUrl: ""
  date: "2018 – 2020"
  content: |
    Led transportation and fulfillment operations in a high-volume, performance-driven environment, focusing on process optimization, defect reduction, and team leadership.

    **Transportation Specialist (2019 – 2020)**
    - Managed transportation operations and stakeholder communication
    - Identified and eliminated process inefficiencies
    - Monitored service metrics and ensured operational targets were met

    **Area Manager (2018)**
    - Led a team of 100+ associates in fast-paced operations
    - Ensured adherence to safety and quality standards
    - Provided coaching, performance management, and workforce development

    **Impact**
    - Reduced operational defects and delays
    - Improved team performance and execution consistency
    - Strengthened operational discipline in high-volume environments

- job: "Operations & Executive Leadership"
  company: "Ferriesmart / Jand Homes / United Geophysical / Manaksia Industries"
  companyUrl: ""
  date: "2003 – 2016"
  content: |
    Held progressive leadership roles across operations, quality, and executive management, building a strong foundation in manufacturing, logistics, and organizational execution.

    **Chief Operating Officer – Ferriesmart / Jand Homes**
    - Directed company operations to achieve financial and strategic goals
    - Developed operational policies and business plans
    - Oversaw execution of company-wide initiatives

    **Operations Manager – United Geophysical Nigeria Limited**
    - Supported strategic projects and executive leadership initiatives
    - Managed communication, reporting, and organizational alignment
    - Led employee engagement and performance initiatives

    **Quality Control Manager – Manaksia Industries**
    - Managed production quality and process efficiency
    - Led cross-functional improvement initiatives
    - Ensured compliance with quality standards and procedures

    **Impact**
    - Built strong foundation in operational leadership and execution
    - Developed expertise in quality management and process improvement
    - Established leadership capability across multiple industries

item.title: Go + Hugo Portfolio Website
item.description:
Objective

Build a fast, scalable personal website using Hugo to showcase technical projects and professional experience.

Tools

Go, Hugo, Git, GitHub, Netlify

item.title: Hugo Setup Guide
item.description:
Gilbert N. Onyenwezi — Personal Portfolio Site

Hugo Static Site — Setup & Deployment Guide

Project Structure

gilbert-portfolio/
├── config/
│   └── _default/
│       ├── config.toml       # Site-wide settings
│       ├── menus.toml        # Navigation menu config
│       └── params.toml       # Theme parameters
├── content/
│   ├── _index.md             # Homepage
│   ├── experience/
│   │   └── _index.md         # Work history
│   ├── education/
│   │   └── _index.md         # Academic background
│   ├── skills/
│   │   └── _index.md         # Skills & competencies
│   └── contact/
│       └── _index.md         # Contact page
├── assets/
│   └── images/
│       └── profile.jpg       # Headshot
├── static/
│   └── resume.pdf            # Downloadable resume
└── themes/
    └── [chosen-theme]/       # e.g., hugo-profile or PaperMod

Quickstart

1. Install Hugo

brew install hugo          # macOS
# or
winget install Hugo.Hugo   # Windows

2. Create new site

hugo new site gilbert-portfolio
cd gilbert-portfolio

3. Add a theme (recommended: hugo-profile)

git init
git submodule add https://github.com/gurusabarish/hugo-profile themes/hugo-profile

4. Configure config/_default/config.toml

baseURL = "https://gilbert-onyenwezi.netlify.app/"
languageCode = "en-us"
title = "Gilbert N. Onyenwezi"
theme = "hugo-profile"

[params]
  name = "Gilbert N. Onyenwezi"
  description = "Supply Chain & Data Science Leader"
  favicon = "/favicon.ico"

5. Run locally

hugo server -D
# Visit http://localhost:1313

Content Pages (Markdown)

content/_index.md

---
title: "Gilbert N. Onyenwezi"
description: "Supply chain and operations leader with 20+ years experience"
---

Supply chain and operations leader with extensive experience in global
manufacturing and distribution networks, driving process improvements
and operational excellence. Skilled in Lean Six Sigma, data analysis,
and cross-functional collaboration.

Currently pursuing an M.S. in Data Science with AI Specialization at
Northwestern University (expected 2026).

content/experience/_index.md

---
title: "Professional Experience"
---

## Wilsonart — Operational Excellence Manager
*Jun 2024 – Sept 2025 | Temple, Texas*

- Developed transformative supply chain management initiatives
- Tracked monthly manufacturing KPIs and multi-year capacity roadmaps
- Facilitated Kaizen leadership and Operational Excellence coaching

## Wilsonart — Area Manager, Distribution
*Apr 2023 – May 2024 | Temple, Texas*

- Oversaw all distribution and receiving operations
- Initiated continuous improvement using Lean/Six Sigma tools
- Ensured ISO compliance across quality goals

GitHub Setup

# Initialize and push to GitHub
git init
git add .
git commit -m "Initial Hugo portfolio site"
git branch -M main
git remote add origin https://github.com/[your-username]/gilbert-portfolio.git
git push -u origin main

Netlify Deployment

  1. Go to netlify.com → New site from Git
  2. Connect your GitHub repo gilbert-portfolio
  3. Build settings:
    • Build command: hugo --minify
    • Publish directory: public
  4. Click Deploy site
  5. Set custom domain (optional): gilbert-onyenwezi.netlify.app

Auto-deploys trigger on every git push to main.

item.title: Supply Chain KPI Dashboard
item.description:
Problem

Operations teams often lack a unified view of performance across safety, quality, service, and cost.

Objective

Build a KPI-driven dashboard that enables real-time visibility into performance and faster issue identification.

Tools

SQL, Python, Dashboarding Tools
